# GitHub Copilot Instructions

For all tasks in this repository, always read and follow the project guide in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the root of the repository before responding. That file contains the authoritative context for the BorrowHub monorepo, including architecture, coding conventions, and development workflow.

When creating a pull request, always use the template in [`.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`](PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md). Fill in all sections: Description, Component(s) Affected, Related Issue, Type of Change, Checklist, and Screenshots.
